---
title: "Gallery"
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: auto
---

## PhD Research
Featuring pictures of places I've traveled to during my PhD to conduct field work, complete research, or attend conferences or workshops. 

::: {layout="[[1, 1], [1, 1]]"}
![Virginia Institute of Marine Science](img/histologydrawer.jpeg){width=400}{group="research"
description="Preserved Bivalve Tissues in the Shellfish Pathology Lab"}

![Northeastern Marine Science Center](img/nahantview.jpeg){width=400}{group="research"
description="My lab is located on Nahant, north of Boston in Massachusetts Bay."}

![North Carolina Oyster Reef](img/ncoysterreef.jpeg){width=400}{group="research"
description="This site near UNCW is included in my population genomics study."}

![New Mexico Museum of Natural History](img/nhmshells.jpeg){width=400}{group="research"
description="A tour of NMMNH's malacology collection during the Evolution 2023 conference."}

:::

::: {layout="[[1, 1]]"}
![Tjarno Marine Lab, Sweden](img/tjarnostar.jpeg){width=400}{group="research"
description="Sea stars I collected near Kosterhavets National Park for the Ocean Genome Legacy Biorepository."}

![Historic Preserved Oysters at VIMS](img/ffpeoysters.jpeg){width=400}

:::

::: {layout="[[1, 1]]"}

![New Hampshire Oyster Reef](img/nhboat.jpeg){width=400}

![Gulf of Maine](img/maineboat.jpeg){width=400}

![Shoals Marine Lab](img/shoalssunset.JPG){width=400}

:::

## Travel


## Undergrad


## Home
